stage1_policy: Run no more than one hard-LGAR fix without writing a review note; if Stage1 fails, try at least five bounded optimization rounds only when a mechanism signal exists.

rounds.change: Tighten label quality: lsd_top_fraction=0.05 and long_nll_max_quantile=0.60.
rounds.stop_if: positive labels vanish or router precision does not beat random.

rounds.change: Reduce routing harm: local_window=2048 and final_global_budget=0.50.
rounds.stop_if: normal CE exceeds CE-CPT by more than 0.02 after routing begins.
actual budget or routed-token LSD separation disappears.

rounds.change: Stabilize auxiliary pressure: lambda_router=0.01 and lambda_budget=0.005.
rounds.stop_if: router AUC remains <=0.55 and precision@budget remains random.

rounds.change: Keep 75%-100% global budget longer before dropping to 50%.
rounds.stop_if: no high-LSD CE, Long4096 CE, RULER-mini, or NoLiMa-style gain appears.
